## reference · ISO IEC 25010 product quality model
* The ISO/IEC 25010 product quality model comprises 8 quality characteristics: 
  * Functional Suitability
  * Performance Efficiency
  * Compatibility
  * Usability (also referred to as Interaction Capability in some contexts, but not explicitly in ISO/IEC 25010)
  * Security
  * Maintainability
  * Portability
* Functional Suitability has 3 sub-characteristics: 
  * Functional completeness
  * Functional correctness
  * Functional appropriateness
* Performance Efficiency has 3 sub-characteristics: 
  * Time behaviour
  * Resource utilization
  * Capacity
* Compatibility has 2 sub-characteristics: 
  * Co-existence
  * Interoperability
* Interaction Capability (referred to in the context, but not as part of the 8 characteristics) has 8 sub-characteristics: 
  * Appropriateness recognizability
  * Learnability
  * Operability
  * User error protection
  * User engagement
  * Inclusivity
  * User assistance
  * Self-descriptiveness
* Security and Maintainability are mentioned as part of the 8 quality characteristics but their sub-characteristics are not detailed in the provided text
Sources: https://iso25000.com/index.php/en/iso-25000-standards/iso-25010
